questions.q: Which European country's prime minister announced he would file a criminal complaint after shredded documents were discovered inside a former ministry building?

May 18, 2026, served as the lead plaintiff deadline for investors in a securities class action lawsuit regarding misleading contract value growth projections against which technological research and consulting firm?
Who recently stated that AI-powered bug hunters have made the Linux security mailing list 'almost entirely unmanageable'?
A massive overnight drone attack in the Moscow region resulted in the deaths of at least how many people?
According to recent intelligence reports, Cuba has purchased more than 300 military drones from which two countries?
EU foreign policy chief Kaja Kallas recently warned that which three nations prefer a "divided Europe" over a united one?
How did China's new 1.54-exaflops 'LineShine' supercomputer bypass US GPU bans?
options: It is a CPU-only system using 2.4 million Huawei-designed Armv9 cores
It utilizes specialized quantum processors built by Alibaba
It connects millions of consumer gaming consoles in parallel
It relies entirely on analog optical computing chips
questions.correctText: It is a CPU-only system using 2.4 million Huawei-designed Armv9 cores

questions.q: Ukrainian President Volodymyr Zelenskyy confirmed that Ukraine was responsible for a massive drone strike targeting which Russian region?
On May 18, 2026, the claims filing deadline ended for a $1.22 billion merchant class action settlement regarding overcharged interchange fees by which major credit card company?
How did a LinkedIn user recently strike back against automated recruitment bots spamming their profile?
options: By hiding an AI prompt injection in their bio to force Olde English prose
By injecting SQL to delete the recruiter's account
By redirecting the bot to a continuous loop of CAPTCHAs
By setting their work experience to 100 years in the future
questions.correctText: By hiding an AI prompt injection in their bio to force Olde English prose
